location.description: 5 minutes from Tamarindo beach, 45 minutes from Liberia international airport. Paved road access, municipal water, fiber internet.

deal_structure.details: 60/40 split on lot sales after cost recovery. Complex units are a separate JV with fixed 18% developer margin.

key_selling_points: Phase 1 infrastructure 90% complete — roads, water, electric, fiber
Titled lots with clean chain of title, no concession land
5-minute drive to Tamarindo, 20 minutes to Flamingo and Potrero beaches

target_audiences.hook: Titled lots from $45k in a market appreciating 12-15% annually. Phase 1 infra is done — build or hold.
Build your home 5 minutes from the beach on a 1000+ sqm lot. Paved roads, fiber internet, municipal water already in.
Year-round warm climate, low cost of living, easy residency path. Private hospital 30 minutes away.

timeline.phase_1: Infrastructure complete Q2 2026. First 15 lots delivered with road, water, electric, fiber.
timeline.completion: Full buildout by Q4 2027. Complex units start Q1 2027.
